site.name: Agustin Sosa
site.title: Agustin Sosa — Software Developer
site.description: Software developer focused on backend, fullstack, and data. Building functional and scalable solutions with Python, FastAPI, React, and Next.js. Based in San Luis, Argentina.
site.tagline: I build functional, scalable solutions — from REST API design and data modeling to full-featured web applications with React and Next.js.

about.label: About
about.title: A bit about me
about.subtitle: Developer, problem-solver, and lifelong learner.
about.bio0: I'm a software developer based in San Luis, Argentina, focused on backend, fullstack, and data solutions. I work with Python, FastAPI, SQL, and React to build functional and scalable applications — from REST API design to full-featured frontends with Next.js.
about.bio1: I graduated as a Systems Programmer from the Universidad Nacional de Villa Mercedes and I'm currently pursuing my Systems Engineering degree at the same institution. My academic background gives me a solid foundation in software architecture, data modeling, and systems design.
about.bio2: I have real production experience developing features, debugging, and maintaining platforms in professional environments. I adapt quickly to new technologies and contexts, and I'm driven by solving real problems with clean, well-organized code.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Selected Work
projects.subtitle: Projects built with real technologies, focused on solving concrete problems.

autoservicio.title: Self-Service Ordering System
autoservicio.description: Web application for order management in gastronomic establishments. Operates across three interfaces: customer (browsing and placing orders), kitchen (real-time order queue for cooks), and admin (product and user management). Built with Next.js App Router, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, and NextAuth.js.

mobile.title: Tourism Mobile App
mobile.description: Full-stack management system with a containerized architecture. React/TypeScript frontend, FastAPI Python backend with Swagger documentation, and PostgreSQL hosted on Railway. Multi-container deployment via Docker Compose.

inventario.title: Inventory System (In Progress)
inventario.description: Backend service for inventory management built with Python and FastAPI. Containerized with Docker, focused on clean data modeling, CRUD endpoints, and good code organization practices.

skills.label: Skills
skills.title: What I Work With
skills.subtitle: Technologies I use to build backend systems, fullstack applications, and data solutions.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Where I've Worked
experience.subtitle: Professional experience in real production environments.

dagatek.description: Fullstack development in a real production environment, working on an existing codebase within a multidisciplinary team.
dagatek.highlight0: Completed and extended production landings with Next.js and TailwindCSS, implementing new sections and features
dagatek.highlight1: Debugging and evolutive maintenance: identified and fixed functional errors in interfaces, ensuring visual consistency
dagatek.highlight2: Backend visibility: worked in an environment with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Docker — collaborated on backend containerization with Docker Compose
dagatek.highlight3: Professional Git/GitHub workflow, delivering project-oriented results in a team setting
